name: Woolly Aphid
description: A flashier variant of the normal aphid, just as small and skittish but with a much more noticeable silhouette. It is still more prey than threat.
behavior: It behaves almost exactly like a normal aphid: wandering, pausing briefly, then hopping away the moment anything feels dangerous.
interactionWithPlayer: It flees the moment it notices you, so catching it is more about cutting off its route than chasing it across open ground.
interactionWithCreatures: Around other creatures it reacts just like a normal aphid: its first and almost only answer is to run.
strategy: Treat it like an aphid with a better coat: hit fast before it chains several hops and slips away from you.
